# CWE-277 — Insecure Inherited Permissions (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-277-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"syscall"
)

// Safe: restrictive umask so created directories are not world-writable.
func ProvisionWorkspace(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	dir := r.URL.Query().Get("dir")
	if dir == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing dir", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	old := syscall.Umask(027)
	defer syscall.Umask(old)
	_ = os.MkdirAll(dir, 0750)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}
